CustomField.description: SFDC had too many object reference to add a Created by fxUserExtraAttributes field, so this field looks for fxUserExtraAttributesof the person that created the Opportunity. If this Opportunity was created by a user that has the fxUserExtraAttributes, included "1000-LDR" then the box will be checked.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If this Opportunity was created by a user that has the fxUserExtraAttributes contain "1000-LDR", then the box will be checked.
CustomField.label: Created by LDR
